name: local-llm cost report includes a baseline reduction percentage in the 30 to 50 percent target band
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm && printf '{"baseline_daily_tokens":10000,"avoided_daily_tokens":4000}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/stats.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/local-llm/cost-report.sh" --stats .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/stats.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'reduction_pct=40' out.txt && grep -q 'target_band=30-50' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
